steps.title: Read the graph at the start and end times
steps.content: At $x = 0$ minutes (when Maksim left the water fountain), the graph shows $y = 0$ meters. At $x = 10$ minutes, the graph shows $y = 600$ meters.

steps.title: Find the distance walked as the change in total distance
steps.content: Distance walked = $y(10) - y(0) = 600 - 0 = 600$ meters. The answer is 600.
